Choosing The Next Step
@agentic_function calling sub-functions in a fixed order How the model picks the next step (the tool-call loop) Next-step decision making (decision.make / exec(choices=))

agentic_function Providers Runtime
Design Documents
Design Documents Usage Metering 子系统设计 设计文档与代码不对齐的待修项 设计文档站（统一文档网页）
Channels
Channels Channel 子系统设计 Channel 子系统设计审计
CLI / TUI
CLI / TUI CLI Naming Convention Config write safety — atomic `update_config` OpenProgram CLI / TUI Redesign Slash Commands — Reference Implementations Snapshot Slash Commands — Unified Design TUI upgrade: transcript rendering & interaction Web UI Ports — Architecture, Configuration, and Conflict Handling 统一 @agentic_function 执行路径
Context
Context Context — 上下文层 上下文压缩 上下文成分对比 —— 参考项目 vs 我们（按三层组织） 上下文组成 —— 注册式三层（目标态设计）
Extension Gating
Extension Gating Future work — explicitly NOT built Implementation map Reference-implementation comparison
Function Design
Function Design @agentic_function Function calling Function Metadata Specification 函数元数据规范 模型选择下一步的逻辑(工具调用循环) 纯 Python 函数
Function Calling
@agentic_function 按固定顺序调用子函数
Integrations
Integrations Harness Standard — how an agentic program plugs into OpenProgram MCP 工具集成 Skills & Plugins — 设计稿 v2（博采众长，全功能）
Memory — 记忆系统设计
Memory — 记忆系统设计 Memory subsystem Memory v2 — 实体/虚拟两级 + Provenance 导航召回 实体记忆 (Entity Memory) 实体记忆走 Git: Session-Git + Project-Git 抽象记忆 (Virtual Memory)
Proactive Layer — 设计
Proactive Layer — 设计 OpenProgram · 事件层 API Reference OpenProgram · 事件层设计（可视化） OpenProgram · 框架演进（可视化） 三条样板规则 事件与状态（地基） 事件层 总览：跟着一个场景走一遍 框架演进：现状 → 目标 框架自己要守的底线 规则怎么写、怎么跑
Providers
Providers OpenProgram · 报错与超时机制（现状） 请求构建:Context → 各 provider 参数
Auth
API-key / credential resolution unification claude-code 直连订阅(砍掉 Meridian) Credential status redesign — "usable or stopped", no COOLING badge Credential-validation unification Unified account management + pool rotation/fallback Unified self-contained auth storage
Models
Thinking / Effort 子系统设计 模型目录与 Provider 配置
Reliability
Error-taxonomy propagation — structured LLM errors up to the UI LLM-call fault tolerance & timeout management OpenProgram · 报错与超时机制（现状） 模型调用的错误处理与重试决策逻辑
Runtime
Runtime Agent Worktree 工具 Agent 调用流程（权威设计） Agentic 函数防自递归机制 Agentic 函数防自递归机制 — 设计文档（可视化） Async Task 生命周期 DAG Viewport 设计文档 DAG 边字段重命名设计文档 Multi-agent + per-turn revert: status Next-step decision making(decision.make / exec(choices=)) P3 — 三端同步(补全)+ P1/P2 上三端 Rewind — 回退到任意历史消息 Runtime — 设计理由 Session DAG 模型—— 数据结构 + 上下文检索 + 两套合并(最终定稿) Session Name — 会话命名设计 Splitting `agent/dispatcher.py` into a responsibility-scoped package User input requests: pausing a run to ask the user 分支自动命名设计文档 分支自动命名设计（可视化） 文件修改管理 — 行业分析与 OpenProgram 设计 统一 parent_id 与 called_by — 设计方案 统一 session 上下文创建 运行中状态的持久化 / 重连恢复 长跑 agent 任务的可控性 + 三端一致性
Session 子系统
Session 子系统 LLM 标题生成 Session 上下文 Session 操作流程 Session 数据模型 Session 管理方案对比
Web UI
Web UI Composer interaction modes — 输入框作为"用户决定"的统一承接点 GUI agent — 调用结构与上下文流 Indicator dot system OpenProgram · 附件处理设计（可视化） Surface system (dark mode) 附件处理设计（Web 聊天）
Philosophy
Agentic Programming — 设计哲学
Plans
改动规划：让 content block 上的 cache_control 透传到 Anthropic API 落地规划：Proactive Layer 接入现有代码
Reference
Claude Code 上下文压缩机制 — 完整流程参考
Research
调研:agent 执行记录用什么数据模型 —— 选 span

Documentation#

This directory is the documentation entry point for OpenProgram.

Start here#

File Purpose
GETTING_STARTED.md Installation, provider setup, and runnable examples
features.md Detailed tour of the key features the README summarises
install.md What each pip extra adds + post-install steps
installing-harnesses.md Harnesses: install any (first/third-party) by one command, write your own
troubleshooting.md "It doesn't work" cookbook (no provider, port in use, multi-repo install …)
API.md Public API index
README_CN.md Chinese project overview
philosophy/agentic-programming.md Agentic Programming rationale

Agentic programming guide#

OpenProgram's own programming model — the concepts a generic LLM-framework tutorial will not teach you. Read this before writing functions.

File Purpose
agentic-programming/README.md Guide index + learning path
agentic-programming/writing-functions/agentic-function.md @agentic_function usage patterns
agentic-programming/writing-functions/function-metadata.md Function metadata — source of truth
agentic-programming/choosing-the-next-step/fixed-order-calls.md Fixed-order sub-function pipelines
agentic-programming/choosing-the-next-step/tool-calling.md Provider-native tool-use loop
agentic-programming/choosing-the-next-step/next-step-decision.md decision.make / exec(choices=) — LLM picks the next step
agentic-programming/writing-functions/pure-python.md Plain Python helpers (no LLM)

API reference#

File Purpose
api/agentic_function.md @agentic_function decorator API
api/runtime.md Runtime.exec() and runtime behavior
api/providers.md Provider/runtime classes and setup
provider-token-tracking.md Provider usage accounting semantics

Integration guides#

File Purpose
INTEGRATION_CLAUDE_CODE.md Claude Code subscription/runtime integration
INTEGRATION_OPENCLAW.md OpenClaw integration patterns

Design notes#

Use design/README.md as the entry point. It separates current specs from archived audits and standalone demos.

Maintenance rules#

  • Keep current API facts under api/; keep design rationale under design/; keep function-authoring guides under agentic-programming/.
  • Prefer linking to a source document instead of repeating the same rules in multiple files.
  • If a design note no longer defines current behavior, move it to design/archive/.
  • Verify docs with a relative-link check after moving files.
本页内容
Start here Agentic programming guide API reference Integration guides Design notes Maintenance rules
